name: SM Friendly Reminder
dunning_letter_text: This is a friendly reminder that the referenced invoice is past due. Please arrange payment at your earliest convenience.

name: SM Second Notice
dunning_letter_text: This is a second notice regarding the referenced invoice which remains unpaid. Immediate attention is required to avoid further escalation.

name: SM Escalation
dunning_letter_text: This invoice has been escalated to operations for personal outreach. The account is 30+ days past due.

name: SM Executive Escalation
dunning_letter_text: This invoice has been escalated to executive leadership. The account is 60+ days past due and requires immediate executive attention.
